title: AMC Entertainment Financial Results - Investor Relations
text: AMC Entertainment Holdings provides comprehensive quarterly earnings reports and financial results through its investor relations website. The company reports earnings for all quarters in both 2023 and 2024. For Q3 2023, AMC reported revenues exceeding $1.4 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $194 million, representing the company's most successful third quarter results in its 103-year history, significantly exceeding pre-pandemic 2019 results. For the second consecutive quarter in 2023, AMC reported positive net income and ended the quarter with $730 million in cash. These reports are available directly through AMC's investor relations financial results page where you can access earnings release PDFs, 10-Q forms, 10-K filings, and XBRL data. The company maintains transparent reporting on quarterly performance metrics including revenue, earnings per share, adjusted EBITDA, attendance, and balance sheet information.
